particulars.description: All and whole the property known as and forming winston barracks, hyndford road, lanark being the subjects shown outlined red on the plan under exception of the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN203357 and being (I) part and portion of the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN106681, (ii) the whole subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN106684, and (iii) the whole subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN201034. Together with the servitude rights as set out in clause 3 of the deed of conditions by the said abbey developments (lanark) LTD dated of even date with this standard security and registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN106681, LAN106684 and LAN201034 on or around the date of this standard security.

All and whole the property known as and. Forming winston barracks, hyndford road, lanark being the subjects shown outlined red on the plan under exception of the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN203357 and being (¡) part and portion of the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN106681, (ii) the whole subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN106684, and (iii) the whole subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN201034. Together with the servitude rights as set out in clause 3 of the deed of conditions by the said abbey developments (lanark) LTD dated of even date with the security documents and registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN106681, LAN106684 and LAN201034 on or around the date of the security documents.

All and whole the property known as and. Forming winston barracks, hyndford road, lanark being the subjects shown outlined red on the plan annexed and executed as relative hereto and being (I) part and portion of the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN106681, (ii) the whole subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN106684, and (iii)the whole subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number LAN201034.
